ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sondes" (
  "sonde_uuid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each sonde */,
  "sonde_serial_no" INTEGER /* Serial number of the sonde */,
  "date_reception" TEXT /* Date when the sonde was received */,
  "date_withdrawal" TEXT /* Date when the sonde was withdrawn from service */,
  "sonde_model_id" INTEGER /* Model identifier of the sonde */,
  "in_repair" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sonde is currently in repair (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "out_of_order" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sonde is out of order (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "lost" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sonde is lost (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "off_network" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sonde is off network (1 for yes, 0 for no) */,
  "sonde_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the sonde */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Current location identifier of the sonde */,
  "last_known_location" TEXT /* Last known location of the sonde */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Scheduled date for the next maintenance */,
  "total_hours_operated" INTEGER /* Total operational hours of the sonde */,
  "last_operational_status" TEXT /* Last recorded operational status */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the sonde record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sonde record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the sonde record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sonde record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sonde_uuid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sondes_sonde_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("sonde_model_id") REFERENCES sonde_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sonde_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model of sonde */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the sonde model */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sonde model */,
  "specifications" TEXT /* Specifications related to the sonde model */,
  "lifecycle_expectancy" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the sonde model */,
  "maintenance_frequency" TEXT /* Recommended frequency of maintenance */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period for the sonde model */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the model record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the model record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the model record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sonde_uuid" TEXT /* UUID of the sonde that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* User who performed the maintenance */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the maintenance activity */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "parts_used" TEXT /* List of parts used during maintenance */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the maintenance record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the maintenance record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the maintenance record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the maintenance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sonde_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("sonde_uuid") REFERENCES sondes ("sonde_uuid")
)

CREATE TABLE "sonde_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status record */,
  "sonde_uuid" TEXT /* UUID of the sonde */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was recorded */,
  "status_type" TEXT /* Type of status (e.g., operational, non-operational) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the status */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* User who reported the status */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the status record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status record was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the status record */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sonde_status_sonde_uuid FOREIGN KEY ("sonde_uuid") REFERENCES sondes ("sonde_uuid")
)
